No robots were injured during the creation of this scheme.

··Part Code 0:  Frame color, used for outlining objects
··Part Code 1:  Fill color, used as the background
··Part Code 2:· Text color
··Part Code 3:· Light tinge, used inside frames on the top and lef
Windows 3.1 / This scheme makes your Mac resemble the Windows 3.1 Operating System from Microsoft.
Windows 95 / This color scheme makes your Mac visually resemble the Windows 95 Operating System from Microsoft.
